responses: Hello! Welcome to HIVCare Companion. How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm here to help you with any questions about HIV, testing, or prevention.
Hello! Feel free to ask me anything about HIV and related health topics. I'm here to support you.

**HIV (Human Immunodeficiency Virus)** attacks the body's immune system, specifically CD4 cells. If untreated, it can lead to AIDS.

🔑 Key facts:
• HIV is treatable — people on ART live long, healthy lives
• Undetectable = Untransmittable (U=U)
• Early testing is vital
HIV stands for Human Immunodeficiency Virus. It weakens the immune system by destroying CD4 cells. Modern treatment (ART) allows people with HIV to live nearly normal life expectancies.

HIV is transmitted through body fluids: blood, semen, vaginal fluids, and breast milk.

🔴 **High-risk routes:**
• Unprotected sex (anal, vaginal)
• Sharing needles or syringes
• Mother to child (during birth or breastfeeding)

✅ **HIV is NOT spread through:**
• Hugging, kissing, or handshakes
• Sharing food, toilets, or insect bites

patterns: how to know if i have hiv
responses:
Early HIV symptoms (2–4 weeks) may include fever, sore throat, swollen lymph nodes, and rash. However, many people have **NO symptoms for years.**

**An HIV test is the only way to know your status.** If you're concerned about an exposure, please get tested.

patterns: how long after exposure to test
responses:
HIV testing is quick, often free, and confidential at clinics, health centers, and through self-test kits.

🩺 **When to test:**
• Every 6-12 months if sexually active
• After any potential exposure

You can use our '**Nearby Healthcare**' feature to find the closest testing facility! ✅

Prevention strategies include:

✅ Use condoms consistently
✅ Get tested regularly
✅ PrEP — a daily pill for HIV-negative people at risk
✅ PEP — emergency medication within 72 hours of exposure
✅ U=U — if your partner is on ART and undetectable, they cannot transmit HIV.

**PrEP (Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis)** is a daily pill for HIV-negative people that reduces the risk of HIV infection by up to 99% when taken as prescribed. Talk to your doctor if you're interested in starting PrEP! 💊

**Treatment (ART — Antiretroviral Therapy):**

💊 ART is a combination of medications taken daily
• It doesn't cure HIV but controls it effectively
• People on ART can reach an "undetectable" viral load
• Undetectable = Untransmittable (U=U)

With treatment, people with HIV live long, healthy lives. 🌿

**U=U (Undetectable = Untransmittable)** 🎉

When a person with HIV takes ART consistently and reaches an undetectable viral load, they **CANNOT** sexually transmit HIV to their partner. This is a scientific fact and highly empowering for those on treatment! 💙

You are **not alone.** 💙 Many people live full, meaningful lives with HIV. Support is available through:

• HIV counselling at your local clinic
• Online support communities
• Our '**Emotional Support**' section in this app

Would you like to talk about how you're feeling?
Take care! Remember, knowledge is power. Stay safe! 👋
Goodbye! I'm always here if you have more questions. Stay healthy. 🌿
Bye! Have a wonderful day. Take care of yourself.
